name: Buffalo Trace Distillery
description: One of the oldest distilleries in America, Buffalo Trace produces premium bourbon with a legacy spanning over 200 years. Their craft spirits showcase traditional techniques and innovative approaches.

name: Jack Daniel's Distillery
description: Historic Tennessee whiskey distillery famous for their charcoal mellowing process. Experience the craft behind one of the world's most recognized bourbon brands.

name: Balcones Distilling
description: Award-winning craft distillery in Texas producing artisanal whiskey, rum, and other premium spirits. Known for innovative flavor profiles and sustainable practices.

name: Breckenridge Distillery
description: High-altitude craft distillery in the Rocky Mountains producing bourbon, gin, and whiskey with mountain spring water. Experience world-class spirits in a scenic setting.

name: New Riff Distillery
description: Craft distillery producing 100% straight bourbon whiskey using traditional methods and locally-sourced grains. Known for their commitment to quality and transparency.

name: Willamette Valley Distillery
description: Oregon craft distillery specializing in whiskey and spirits made from Pacific Northwest ingredients. Award-winning spirits in a family-friendly tasting room.

name: Kings County Distillery
description: Urban craft distillery in Brooklyn producing whiskey, bourbon, and specialty spirits. Tour their historic facility and taste innovative craft spirits.

name: Watershed Distillery
description: Pacific Northwest craft distillery producing vodka, gin, and whiskey with focus on sustainability and local ingredients. Modern tasting room in downtown Seattle.

name: Piedmont Distillery
description: Craft distillery in North Carolina's foothills producing bourbon, rye, and gin. Beautiful venue with event space and scenic mountain views.

name: Sonoma Distillery
description: California craft distillery producing spirits with local ingredients and traditional techniques. Visit the tasting room and discover premium craft spirits.
